_comment: Lucid configuration — all features can be enabled/disabled per preference. Defaults are tuned for most users.

autoApply._note: Auto-apply is opt-in. Set enabled: true to activate.

_comment_topic: Set this to your notification target, e.g. telegram:-1234567890:topic:5. Leave null to use main chat.

aggressiveCleanup._comment: When enabled, Lucid auto-removes resolved Open Loops, closed Blockers, and confirmed-stale entries from MEMORY.md instead of just flagging them. Removals are git-committed for easy rollback. Default: off.
